document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

provisions.text: P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any P-2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area 30,000 square feet (2787 m2) Minimum Frontage 100 feet (30.5 m) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard building ½ the height of the main Maximum Lot Coverage 50 per cent

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: OPEN SPACE USES

provisions.text: P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: OPEN SPACE USES Notwithstanding Section 22.2, in any P -2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued for open space uses except in conformity with the following: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 30 feet (9.1 m)

provisions.text: P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: SHARED HOUSING WITH SPECIAL CARE (RC- Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Notwithstanding Section 22.2, in any P -2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued for shared housing with special care (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area 20,000 square feet (1858 m2) Minimum Frontage 100 feet (30.5 m) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 20 feet (6.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 8 feet (2.4 m) Maximum Lot Coverage 35 per cent

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any P-2 (Community Facility) Zone except for

Schools Denominational institutions and uses Day care facilities A single dwelling unit in conjunction with a day care facility Fire and police stations Government offices and public works Hospitals and medical clinics Public libraries, museums and galleries Community centres and halls Shared housing with 10 or fewer bedrooms (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Shared housing with special care (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Open space uses Recreation uses
In any P-2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the

content_blocks.text: Notwithstanding Section 22.2, in any P -2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: for open space uses except in conformity with the following:
content_blocks.text: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 30 feet (9.1 m)

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: 22.4 P-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS: SHARED HOUSING WITH SPECIAL CARE (RC-
content_blocks.text: Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Notwithstanding Section 22.2, in any P -2 Zone, no development permit shall be issued for shared housing with special care (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) except in conformity

Minimum Lot Area 20,000 square feet (1858 m2) Minimum Frontage 100 feet (30.5 m) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 20 feet (6.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 8 feet (2.4 m) Maximum Lot Coverage 35 per cent
The following landscaping provisions shall be required of all uses, except for shared housing (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) and fire and police stations, as conditions of any

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: development permit issued in a P-2 Zone:
content_blocks.text: (a) A landscaped area of twenty (20) feet in width shall be provided along any property line which abuts a local street. (b) A landscaped area of eight (8) feet in width shall be provided along any side or rear property line which abuts an R -1 (Single Unit Dwelling) Zone or RR -1 (Restricted Residential) Zone. (c) The minimum landscaping requirement for landscaped areas shall be sodding or seeding.

(a) No parking areas shall be permitted within any required side or rear yard. (b) All parking areas shall be demarcated and paved or otherwise treated with a stable surface which is treated in a manner to prevent the raising of dust and loose particles.

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
